tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: All I Want For Christmas Is You

recommended.version_description: These are the chords for Taylor Swift's new song "Gorgeous" from her album "reputation".

content:
This is pretty much how I play it. I don't know if the chord names are correct, 
but I'm 99% sure they fit the song perfectly. The same pattern repeats over and over. 


[ch]E[/ch] - 022100
[ch]B9[/ch] - x99800
[ch]A9[/ch] - x76600
